articles.title: Starmer considers political future as pressure to quit mounts
articles.description: It comes as US President Donald Trump says on social media that the PM will resign, in a further blow to the Labour leader.

articles.title: Signs grow that PM will resign with mood in government shifting
articles.description: The BBC's Henry Zeffman and Nick Eardley on the mood in government as speculation grows about the prime minister's departure.

articles.title: Trump and Iran's negotiator trade warnings as talks held in Switzerland
articles.description: The US president, who is not at the talks, threatens to attack Iran if it does not restrain Hezbollah in Lebanon.

articles.title: Family of driver killed in Bedford train crash 'devastated' by loss
articles.description: Shaun Burton's family say they are devastated, while a union leader calls his death "heartbreaking".
